text: Getting Started with Our Platform
Welcome to our comprehensive guide. This article walks you through everything you need to know to get up and running quickly.
Check out our documentation for more details.

text: Platform Comparison
Code Example

tabs.label: JavaScript
tabs.content: Install with npm: `npm install @example/sdk` then import and initialize the client.

tabs.label: Python
tabs.content: Install with pip: `pip install example-sdk` then import and initialize the client.

tabs.label: cURL
tabs.content: Use the REST API directly: `curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer TOKEN' https://api.example.com/v1/users`

Frequently Asked Questions

accordionItems.title: How do I get started?
accordionItems.content: Sign up for a free account, no credit card required. You'll be guided through the setup process step by step.

accordionItems.title: Can I import my existing data?
accordionItems.content: Yes! We support CSV, JSON, and direct API imports. Our migration tool handles most formats automatically.

accordionItems.title: What happens when my trial ends?
accordionItems.content: Your data is preserved. You can upgrade to a paid plan or export everything. We never delete your data without notice.
